surface.name: Uptime dashboard: first HTTP monitor
surface.selection_basis: The hosted dashboard path creates a working HTTP monitor without installing an agent or writing code.

alternatives_considered.name: Heartbeat monitor
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: A heartbeat requires an external job to call Better Stack; an HTTP monitor can check an existing URL directly.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a Better Stack account and monitor a public HTTP endpoint.
assumed_prior_state: The developer begins before account creation with no platform resources or credentials.
A supported browser and internet connection are available.

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: A hosted HTTP monitor checks the supplied URL and reports its current status.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: The monitor detail page shows a completed check and an Up status for the endpoint.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: The monitor detail page shows a completed check and an Up status for the endpoint.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: This is the first observable end-to-end result on the selected official surface; later production configuration and expansion follow it.

prerequisites.requirement: A publicly reachable HTTP or HTTPS URL to monitor.

primary_path.action: Create or sign in to a Better Stack account and open Uptime.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

primary_path.action: Choose to create a monitor and select HTTP monitoring.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

primary_path.action: Enter the endpoint URL and save the monitor.
primary_path.output: The monitor is listed and checks begin.
primary_path.success_signal: The monitor is listed and checks begin.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

primary_path.action: Open the monitor and confirm the first completed check.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

friction_gates.description: The monitored URL must be reachable from Better Stack.

uncertainties.question: The docs do not fully expose every fresh-account signup or verification screen.
uncertainties.impact: The exact number or ordering of required onboarding actions may vary for a fresh account.
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: Public official documentation does not fully expose every authenticated or account-dependent state.

excluded_after_success: Production hardening, scale configuration, and ongoing operations after the first successful result.
